refnamediv.refpurpose: add an equation to a model

listitem.para: * position = either a scalar, indicating where to add the equation or 'bottom' to add it at the bottom of the model or 'top' to add it at the top of the model
* nameq = a string vector, the names of the new equations
* txteq = a string vector, the texts of the new equations
* notransf = an optional argument: if given then the model is not transformed for simulation
* model2 = a model tlist with the given equations added

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Adds equations to a model.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
